plugins.name: jfredToolsPlugin
plugins.description: Standalone home for '/run-scenario' (drive a Claude agent through a scenario file in tmux) and '/sync-jsonl-projects' (back up Claude Code session JSONL files and file-history), usable from any directory via --plugin-dir.
